# PHIL.112 ? Jobs to be Done Mindset

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** customer_focus
**Subcategory:** jobs_to_be_done_mindset
**Domain:** CUSTOMER_FOCUS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Customers hire products to get jobs done in their lives

## Application
Understand functional and emotional jobs, design solutions for jobs not features, measure job success
